title: dryopteris thelypteris f. haleana
intro: Dryopteris thelypteris f. haleana, commonly known as the Leathery Shield Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The therapeutic actions of the Leathery Shield Fern include antimicrobial, antifungal, and antiviral properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and polysaccharides, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
